name: Peanut Butter Cookie Pops (Wilton)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Thoroughly cream together butter, peanut butter, sugar, egg, and vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, toss dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt) together and blend into the creamed mixture.
4. Shape dough into balls.
5. Roll each ball approximately 1/8 inch thick.
6. Dip cookie cutters into flour before use.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
8. Cool completely.
9. Dip in chocolate or make peanut butter chocolate sandwiches.
10. To assemble, place one or two wafers of candy melts on a warm cookie and sandwich two cookies together on a lollipop stick.
